zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert De Turberville於1120年出生時，他的父親Payne de Turberville I11117歲，母親Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity31歲。他與Agnes結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1148年在威爾士格拉莫爾根布利其史德享年28歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根艾尤尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gilbert De Turberville于1120年出生时，他的父亲Payne de Turberville I11117岁，母亲Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity31岁。他与Agnes结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1148年在威尔士格拉莫爾根布利其史德享年28岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根艾尤尼。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert De Turberville was born in 1120, his father, Payne de Turberville I, was 11117 and his mother, Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, was 31. He married Agnes. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1148, in Bridgend, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 28, and was buried in Ewenny, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert De Turberville est né en 1120, son père, Payne de Turberville I, avait 11117 ans et sa mère, Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Agnes. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1148, à Bridgend, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterré à Ewenny, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gilbert De Turberville 1120 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Payne de Turberville I 11117 und seine Mutter Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity 31. Er hat Agnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1148 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Bridgend, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Ewenny, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert De Turberville è nato il nel 1120, il suo padre, Payne de Turberville I, aveva 11117 anni e il suo madre, Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Agnes. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1148, nel Bridgend, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolto a Ewenny, Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Turbervilleが1120年に生まれた時，父Payne de Turberville Iは11117歳，母Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coityは31歳であった。Agnesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1148年にウェールズグラモーガンブリジェンドで28歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズグラモーガンエウエニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert De Turberville(이)가 1120년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Payne de Turberville I(은)는 11117세였고, 그의 어머니 Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1148년 웨일스 글램르건 브리지드에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 글램르건 웬이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert De Turberville nasceu em 1120, seu pai, Payne de Turberville I, tinha 11117 anos e sua mãe, Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1148, em Bridgend, Glamorgan, Gales, com 28 anos, e foi sepultado em Ewenny, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert De Turberville родился в 1120 г., его отцу по имени Payne de Turberville I было 11117 лет, а матери, которую звали Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1148 г. в местности бридженд, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 28 лет и был похоронен в местности ювенни, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gilbert De Turberville nació en 1120, su papá, Payne de Turberville I, tenía 11117 años y su mamá, Sara Sybil verch Morgan of Coity, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Agnes. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1148, en Bridgend, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultado en Ewenny, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido.
